ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the individual in the global wealth list */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the individual */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the individual is from */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "net_worth_bil" REAL /* Net worth of the individual in billions of dollars */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the individual */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the individual's photo */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual's record is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country in billions of dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "net_worth_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each net worth record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the record belongs to */,
  "net_worth_bil" REAL /* Net worth of the individual in billions of dollars */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the net worth was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the net worth data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the net worth record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_worth_history_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "family_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the family member is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the family member */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the primary individual (e.g., spouse, child) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the family member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "share_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of wealth shared with the family member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the industry belongs (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_industries" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual-industry relationship */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "primary_industry" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the primary industry for the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the individual in the industry (e.g., CEO, Founder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individual_industries_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individual_industries_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the individual record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the individual record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the security question */,
  "answer_length" INTEGER /* Maximum length of the answer to the security question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_security_answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security answer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who answered the security question */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security question being answered */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer to the security question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_security_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES security_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_security_answers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
